task_completion.description: Verify the agent has logged into MedinTux Manager.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The MedinTux Manager main dashboard or interface is visible, indicating a successful login as a practitioner.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent has opened the form to register a new patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Patient', 'Add Patient', or patient registration dialog/window is open within the MedinTux application.

task_completion.description: Verify the patient's name, date of birth, and sex are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form fields show Last Name (Nom) as 'ROUSSEAU', First Name (Prénom) as 'Laurent', Date of Birth as '1975-08-14' (or '14/08/1975'), and Sex as Male ('M' or 'Masculin').

task_completion.description: Verify the patient's address and phone number are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form fields show Address as '56 Rue Championnet', Postal Code (CP) as '75018', City (Ville) as 'Paris', and Phone (Tel) as '06.45.67.89.01'.

task_completion.description: Verify the patient's Social Security Number is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Social Security Number (Secu / NIR) field shows '1750875018021'.

task_completion.description: Verify the new patient record has been successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation message indicating the patient was created, or the patient 'ROUSSEAU Laurent' is visible in the active patient list, database view, or saved profile summary.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the MedinTux graphical user interface to enter the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show typing and clicking within the MedinTux application windows, not executing scripts or commands in a terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual MedinTux software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window displays MedinTux branding and standard UI elements, rather than a generic text editor or a mock web form.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the application by directly inserting data into the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open running SQL commands (e.g., 'INSERT INTO patients...') or database management tools like phpMyAdmin.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient details to verify: Name: ROUSSEAU Laurent, DOB: 1975-08-14 (or 14/08/1975), Sex: Male, Address: 56 Rue Championnet, Postal code: 75018, City: Paris, Phone: 06.45.67.89.01, SSN: 1750875018021. Note that MedinTux is a French software, so fields may be labeled in French (Nom, Prénom, Date de naissance, Sexe, Adresse, Code Postal, Ville, Téléphone, Numéro de Sécurité Sociale / NIR).
